name: Akawalli, the Seething Tower
prompt: Build a self-mill and graveyard-filling Commander deck focused on getting 8+ permanent cards in my graveyard as fast as possible. Prioritize creatures and artifacts with sacrifice outlets or that mill permanents on entering/dying. Include enchantments and creatures that benefit from cards being in the graveyard, token generators to sacrifice for value, reanimation spells, and enough ramp to support Akawalli's aggressive combat plan. Avoid cards that exile graveyard cards. Win through commander damage with a trampling, hard-to-block Akawalli."

commander.name: Akawalli, the Seething Tower
commander.oracle_text:
Descend 4 — As long as there are four or more permanent cards in your graveyard, Akawalli gets +2/+2 and has trample.
Descend 8 — As long as there are eight or more permanent cards in your graveyard, Akawalli gets an additional +2/+2 and can't be blocked by more than one creature.
